_description: All prompt text templates for ad copy LLM generation. Edit this file to change what the LLM sees — no code changes needed. Dynamic placeholders use {fmt}, {support_target}, {copy_fields}.
system_prompt_base_rules: You generate ad copy JSON only. Return valid JSON with keys default_aspect_ratio and ads.

Each ads item must include format, headline_angle, awareness_stage, concept_angle, concept_structure, persona, and copy fields. Provide copy.EN, copy.HI, and copy.HINGLISH blocks when constraints.language includes them.
Use the attached/read product master doc as the single source of product truth; the JSON payload is only request metadata, format/persona guidance, concept selection, and schema control.
Derive benefits, proof, mechanisms, differentiators, exclusions, and priority hierarchy from the product master doc, not from memory or invented claims.
Headline or paired support must ensure the copy is clearly about weight loss — directly or indirectly.
Never include price in on-image copy fields. Do not use currency symbols or words like INR, price, only, discount, off, or MRP.

copy_requirements.concept_variation contains 3 pre-selected execution axes: audience_stage (who the reader is), lead_angle (what to lead with in the headline), message_structure (how to shape the headline-support flow). Copy each .id into your response's awareness_stage, concept_angle, and concept_structure fields respectively. Use the .direction text of each to guide your copy approach.
If copy_requirements.hypothesis exists and type is not none, obey it as the controlled test.

If concept_variation includes optional guidance fields (hook_structure_guidance, proof_style_guidance, cta_voice_guidance, concept_structure_guidance, awareness_stage_guidance, concept_angle_guidance), follow them. Otherwise derive naturally from the persona.
Write one clean, short, catchy headline that conveys the main meaning in one idea. Do not lead headlines with Start, Begin, Kickstart, or Follow.
Divide the payload: headline earns attention with the sharp promise, pain, proof, or contrast; support lines carry the mechanism, timing, product components, proof, routine details, and caveats.
Keep AM/PM timing, protocol mechanics, and product component names out of the headline unless they are the single hook; put them in support lines or bullets when needed.
Avoid AI-ad words such as unlock, transform your journey, revolutionary, holistic wellness, game-changing, effortlessly, and tailored solution.

Do a final editor pass: shorten the headline, remove generic phrasing, and ensure supporting copy follows the assigned concept_structure flow (four_us, pas, bab, fab) by completing the headline instead of repeating it.
Prioritize fast visible weight loss, safer natural-feeling differentiation, real proof, and practical ease; do not let digestion or emotional benefits overshadow weight loss.

Read copy_requirements.headline_architecture.template and .examples — the headline must follow that sentence structure, not just match the content angle. If the template asks for the full framework, compress it into one headline idea and move the rest to support.

Read copy_requirements.support_line_architecture.template and .examples — the support line must follow that sentence architecture. It must add the missing reason/proof/mechanism behind the headline, not default to a generic feature-list pattern.

Read copy_requirements.support_line_strategy.active — it tells you the support line's meaning job for the selected hypothesis/variant. Use support_line_strategy for meaning and support_line_architecture for sentence shape.

The already_used_ads_DO_NOT_REUSE list is a BAN LIST for deduplication only. Do not copy, imitate, adapt, or reference its headlines, support lines, skeletons, or angles. Treat it as forbidden output, not as examples.

BA: For BA format only: never prefix copy with BEFORE:/AFTER: labels or Hindi equivalents.

For BA format only: write explicit split contrast copy. Use 2 or 4 bullets total; bullet 1/2 are left-side struggle state and bullet 3/4 are right-side fix or progress state. If using 2 bullets, bullet 1 is struggle and bullet 2 is fix.
TEST: For TEST format only: headline must read like a first-person review line suitable for a quote card, not generic highly-rated phrasing.

For TEST format only: we do not have real customer testimonials in the source material. Create a made-up but believable representative review line grounded only in product-doc claims, persona pain/desire, and safe outcomes. Do not imply it is a real named customer quote.

For TEST format only: attribution must be role/source-based without personal names and must not imply verification, certification, or a real collected testimonial. Use labels like representative user experience, routine feedback snapshot, or persona-based review note.

For TEST format only: avoid superficial praise such as 'amazing product', 'best ever', 'life-changing', or unbelievable before/after claims. The review should sound specific, modest, and plausible: routine fit, reduced cravings, easier adherence, regular homemade food, guided steps, or visible 15-day progress where supported by the product doc.
FEAT: For FEAT format only: make each bullet a different product feature.
HERO: For HERO format only: follow the headline_architecture template and examples in copy_requirements. Use the assigned support_line_architecture template for the support line. Do not default to a feature-list skeleton.
UGC: For UGC format only: follow the headline_architecture template and examples in copy_requirements. Use creator-like clarity for the support line, and follow the assigned support_line_architecture template.

lines: Return only valid JSON. No markdown. No extra text.
Return one ad only. You may return either a single ad object or an object with default_aspect_ratio and a one-item ads array.
Before writing, rely on the product master doc already attached/read in this OpenCode session. Do not ask for the doc again and do not ignore it.
The current {fmt} ad must use a different persuasion angle in both the headline and the {support_target} from anything in the already_used_ads_DO_NOT_REUSE list.
already_used_ads_DO_NOT_REUSE is a BAN LIST. Do not copy, echo, paraphrase, or adapt any headline, support line, skeleton, or persuasion angle from it.
Obey the headline_architecture.template and support_line_architecture.template in copy_requirements. These override any default pattern.

Before writing, read copy_requirements.concept_variation: use audience_stage.direction to set the reader's awareness level, lead_angle.direction to choose the headline approach, and message_structure.direction to shape the headline-to-support flow.

Before writing the {support_target}, read copy_requirements.support_line_strategy.active.direction, .must_include, and .avoid. This is the active support strategy for the current headline hypothesis/variant.

The {support_target} must combine support_line_strategy.active meaning with support_line_architecture.template structure. If they conflict, preserve the strategy's meaning and adapt the sentence shape naturally.
If hook_structure_override is present, the EN headline must visibly match it. For contrast_loop, use a clear but natural contrast word such as but, yet, still, without, before/after, or even with.
Final editor pass before JSON: rewrite the headline into a finished human ad line, usually 4-9 words, one central idea only. Move mechanism/proof/timing details into support line or bullets.

Use supporting copy to make the headline believable and complete: simple routine, 5-minute ease, doctor-formulated proof, 70,000+ users, 15-day progress, cravings/fullness, digestion support, or less sacrifice.
Support line must add new payload after the headline. If it could sit under any headline, rewrite it with persona friction, mechanism, proof, or result detail from the master doc.
Reject your own first draft if the headline reads like a generic AI slogan, a keyword list, or a paraphrase of supporting copy.
Do not return framework labels, rationale, or explanations.

strict_schema_note.intro: STRICT_SCHEMA: Return JSON only. Do not include copy_requirements, disclaimers, or extra keys.
strict_schema_note.persona_fields_en: persona must be an object with number, name, pain_en, desire_en, friction_en, proof_needed_en, tone_cue_en, pain_hi, desire_hi, friction_hi, proof_needed_hi, tone_cue_hi.
strict_schema_note.language_extension: When constraints.language includes HINGLISH, also include pain_hinglish, desire_hinglish, friction_hinglish, proof_needed_hinglish, tone_cue_hinglish in persona.
strict_schema_note.format_closure_template: For {fmt} format, copy.EN, copy.HI, and copy.HINGLISH (when requested) must contain only: {copy_fields}.

copy_requirements.must_mention: Headline or paired support must ensure the copy is clearly about weight loss — directly or indirectly.
copy_requirements.variation_rule: Do not reuse the same headline skeleton, support-line skeleton, or persuasion angle as other ads in the same format for this batch.
copy_requirements.hierarchy_rule: Use the assigned concept_structure flow (four_us, pas, bab, fab) across headline and support line, not inside the headline alone. Headline = short hook/meaning; support = missing proof/mechanism/context. Do not output framework labels. Derive actual headline/support from product master doc content.

format_specific.HERO: Keep headline as one clean idea. Support line must follow the assigned support_line_architecture template and complete the headline with proof, mechanism, or practical ease.
format_specific.UGC: Creator-like tone is allowed, but keep headline/support grounded in master-doc facts and compliance.
format_specific.BA: Split copy: left bullets are struggle state; right bullets are progress/routine shift.
format_specific.TEST: Quote-like representative headline; attribution + trust line must be role/source-based, non-personal, and must not imply a real verified testimonial.
format_specific.FEAT: Bullets must be distinct product features (LLM decides which features from master doc).

copy_requirements.default_format_rule: Respect format-specific structure; no lane enforcement.

product_doc_bootstrap_prompt: Read the attached product master doc completely. For every following ad-copy request in this same OpenCode session, use that doc as the single source of product truth for benefits, proof, mechanism, differentiators, exclusions, and priority hierarchy. Do not rewrite, summarize, modify, or ignore the doc. The following messages will provide only ad format/persona/concept/schema instructions. Return only valid JSON: {"status":"product_doc_loaded"}.

format_copy_keywords._description: Keywords used to filter which playbook rules are copy-relevant. Rules matching ANY keyword per format are included in the LLM payload.

format_visual_keywords._description: Keywords that identify visual rules. Rules matching ANY keyword are excluded from the copy payload sent to the LLM.

format_defaults._description: Default concept_structure per format (used when no hypothesis overrides it).

persona_mapping._description: Maps persona_seeds.json fields → LLM payload fields. Each entry defines how a seed field is transformed into a payload field.

persona_fallbacks.pain: Daily routine feels heavy and hard to sustain.
persona_fallbacks.desire: A practical routine that feels easy to follow.
persona_fallbacks.friction: Past plans felt too strict and difficult to maintain.
persona_fallbacks.proof: Needs clear structure and believable support.

cta_variants._description: CTA text options per language per format. Used by enforce_unique_ctas to assign unique CTAs.

testimonial_headline_guidance._description: Regex patterns and fallback strings for ensure_testimonial_headline. One entry per language.

EN.suffix: It finally fit my weight-loss routine.
EN.desire_template: "I finally found {desire_phrase} for my weight-loss goal."
EN.fallback: "I finally found a routine I can follow for weight loss every day."

HI.suffix: यह मेरे वजन घटाने के लिए काम आया।
HI.desire_template: "मुझे आखिर {desire_phrase} वाला रूटीन मिला जो वजन घटाने में मदद करता है।"
HI.fallback: "मुझे आखिर ऐसा रूटीन मिला जिसे मैं रोज निभा सकूं और वजन घटा सकूं।"

testimonial_attribution_variants._description: Attribution text variants per language for ensure_testimonial_attribution. Picked deterministically via hash.

feature_templates._description: Feature support lines per feature key. Used in build_template_copy for BA format bullets and HERO/UGC support lines.

structured_system.EN: Structured system for consistent weight-loss progress.
structured_system.HI: लगातार वजन-सपोर्ट के लिए व्यवस्थित सिस्टम।

cravings_down.EN: Helps reduce cravings for better daily weight management.
cravings_down.HI: बेहतर दैनिक वजन-प्रबंधन के लिए लालसा कम करने में सहायक।

guided_weight_loss.EN: Guided morning and night steps for visible results.
guided_weight_loss.HI: दिखने वाले परिणामों के लिए निर्देशित सुबह-रात के कदम।

natural_ingredients.EN: Natural Ayurvedic formulation without side effects.
natural_ingredients.HI: बिना दुष्प्रभाव के प्राकृतिक आयुर्वेदिक फॉर्मूलेशन।

easy_routine.EN: Simple routine that fits into daily life easily.
easy_routine.HI: रोज़मर्रा की ज़िंदगी में आसानी से फिट होने वाली सरल दिनचर्या।

_default.HI: लगातार प्रगति के लिए व्यवस्थित सिस्टम।

template_copy_cta_map._description: Single CTA per format for template copy (build_template_copy). Not the same as cta_variants (which are used by enforce_unique_ctas).

template_copy_format_overrides._description: Format-specific overrides in build_template_copy. BA/FEAT/UGC override the generated template headline. UGC overrides support line. FEAT has hardcoded bullets. TEST has headline + attribution + trust_line.

headline.EN: A clear kit routine beats random dieting.
headline.HI: साफ किट दिनचर्या अनियमित डाइटिंग से बेहतर है।

headline.EN: Three kit steps support 15-day weight loss.
headline.HI: तीन किट कदम 15 दिन के वजन-सपोर्ट में मदद करते हैं।

EN: Morning OK Liquid helps reduce hunger and random snacking for weight loss.
Night Tablet + Powder support digestion and lighter mornings in obesity routine.
Built for visible 15-day weight-loss support without crash-diet pressure.
HI: सुबह का OK Liquid वजन घटाने के लिए भूख और अचानक खाने की आदत कम करने में सहायक है।
रात का Tablet + Powder मोटापा-नियंत्रण दिनचर्या में पाचन-सपोर्ट देता है।
कठोर डाईट दबाव के बिना 15 दिन के वजन-सपोर्ट के लिए बनाया गया।

headline.EN: Late-night cravings can feel easier to control.
headline.HI: रात की लालसा नियंत्रित करना आसान लग सकता है।

support_override.EN: A simple first step helps keep late-night weight-loss control practical.
support_override.HI: एक सरल पहला कदम रात के वजन-नियंत्रण को व्यावहारिक रखता है।

headline.EN: I trusted the 15-day kit because the steps felt clear for weight loss.
headline.HI: मैंने 15 दिन की किट पर भरोसा किया क्योंकि वजन-घटाने के कदम साफ लगे।

attribution.EN: Doctor-formulated Ayurvedic obesity and weight-loss protocol
attribution.HI: डॉक्टर-फॉर्मुलेटेड आयुर्वेदिक मोटापा और वजन-घटाने का प्रोटोकॉल

trust_line.EN: Structured morning-night steps for visible weight-loss progress and obesity control.
trust_line.HI: सुबह-रात के स्पष्ट कदमों से वजन घटाने और मोटापा नियंत्रण का भरोसेमंड सपोर्ट।

template_copy_en_fallbacks._description: English fallback values for build_template_copy when persona fields are empty.

template_copy_hi_fallbacks._description: Hindi fallback values for build_template_copy when persona fields are empty.
template_copy_hi_fallbacks.pain: रोज की वजन-घटाने की दिनचर्या टूटना आसान है।
template_copy_hi_fallbacks.desire: ऐसा आसान सिस्टम चाहिए जो रोज निभ सके।
template_copy_hi_fallbacks.friction: पहले के प्लान बहुत सख्त और मुश्किल थे।
template_copy_hi_fallbacks.proof: साफ कदम, भरोसेमंड सपोर्ट और व्यावहारिक प्रमाण चाहिए।

template_copy_headline_sentence._description: Template string for _template_copy (used by template_headline). {primary_key}, {secondary_key}, {pain} are filled at runtime.
template_copy_headline_sentence.EN: A clear {primary_key} system for {secondary_key} that helps manage {pain}.
template_copy_headline_sentence.HI: {primary_key} का {secondary_key} सिस्टम जो {pain} को संभालने में मदद करता है।

template_copy_support_sentence._description: Template string for template_support in build_template_copy. {primary_key}, {secondary_key} are filled at runtime.
template_copy_support_sentence.HI: सरल कदम, जो {primary_key} और {secondary_key} पर आधारित हैं।
